name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: Trump's shutdown threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's time we make sure more senators who want the government to keep running stay in office.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170503-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team,

This is the world we are living in. Yesterday, our president said our country needs a shutdown. And I am outraged.

Does President Trump understand what a government shutdown would mean? Because I'll tell you right now: Thousands of government employees would go without wages. Children will be turned away from their field trips to hundreds of national parks, museums, and zoos. Government loans to businesses could be delayed.

And why doesn't President Trump think about that? Because he doesn't think about working people. He thinks about his wealthy friends who won't be affected. But we can't let him get away with doing real damage to real people's lives.

A government shutdown is not a tool to further Republicans' agenda. It is the result of the GOP choosing to play politics over settling on a budget that will help American families. But President Trump thinks that their inability to create an acceptable budget is a reason to elect more Republicans to the Senate.

You know what I think? I think this is a sign we need to keep the seats we have, and we have to hold onto them stronger than ever. We should come out of this with a budget that puts our priorities first. And that's what Democratic Senators have been pushing for -- a bipartisan spending bill that invests in working people's health care instead of shutting down the government for partisan reasons. And that's why I'm asking for you to support them today.

[**Donate today -- let 's keep the people who want our government to keep running in office.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170503-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for doing your part to keep us moving forward.

Sincerely,

Chuck Schumer

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Impact Our Nation Today
body:
Hear us... Forgive us... Heal us!

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

Today our nation dedicates time to honor God
and to pray.

"We have been the recipients of the choicest
bounties of Heaven. We have been preserved, these many years, in
peace and prosperity. We have grown in numbers, wealth and
power, as no other nation has ever grown. But we have forgotten
God.

"We have forgotten the gracious hand which
preserved us; and we have vainly imagined, in the deceitfulness
of our hearts, that all these blessings we produced by some
superior virtue and wisdom of our own. Intoxicated with unbroken
success, we have become too self-sufficient to feel the necessity
of redeeming and preserving grace, too proud to pray to the God
that made us!

"It behooves us, then, to humble ourselves
before the offended power, to confess our national sins, and pray
for clemency and forgiveness."

-Abraham Lincoln's Proclamation for a
National Day of Fasting, Humiliation and
Prayer, April 30, 1863

Please join me today - this National Day of
Prayer - in humbling ourselves before our God in confession,
thanksgiving and supplication for our nation.

There are many prayer events happening today
across our country. Please take the time to get involved in one
of them.

Faith makes America stronger,

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement
focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in
local and national elections and be active members of society. By
partnering with local churches, pastors and national faith
leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead
the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics.

body:

| **" It's do-or-die for Trump, GOP health care bill"**
\- _CNN_ , 5/2/2017 Are you ready, Team?

We stopped the first iteration of Trumpcare. But President Trump and the GOP didn't get the message. In fact, they're trying again with a crueler version -- we're calling it Trumpcare 2.0.

Trumpcare 2.0 allows states to waive the most important parts of the Affordable Care Act -- the parts that provided quality coverage to vulnerable Americans.

Insurance companies would be allowed to charge people with pre-existing conditions more for their plans. They can also do away with essential benefits and impose annual lifetime limits on the amount of care Americans can receive.

**The Trumpcare 2.0 vote is happening TODAY.** We must work together to push it over the cliff into the failed legislation abyss, just like we did with Trumpcare 1.0.

[_**Trumpcare 2.0 is reckless, regressive and dangerous. Help make sure it fails. Sign here to protect our health care.**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e93/622b7b5b/2b264cf/307bcdca/2758462790/VEsH/ "http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170503")

Americans don't want to go back to a time when insurance companies could charge women more than men. They don't want plans without coverage for basic services like inpatient care, mental health, or prescription drugs. And Americans definitely don't want the sickest and most vulnerable among us to suffer because they can't afford life-saving care.

Now is the time to take action. [_**Add your name to mine >>**_](http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e93/622b7b5b/2b264cf/307bcdca/2758462790/VEsE/ "http://fl.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170503")

Thank you,

Debbie |

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: what's next on health care
body:
We have to stop Republicans before it's too late.
---
**House Republicans just passed their bill to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Help us raise $100,000 to throw them out of office -- chip in $3 or more today and get your donation matched.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf5d/4067b0a/2fec3dce2/7e74bbed/127909159/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Vote-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170504_tp_nd1&source=em_20170504_tp_nd1&refcode=em_20170504_tp_nd1")****
Friend --

House Republicans just voted to take health care away from 24 million Americans and put millions of people with pre-existing conditions in life-threatening danger.

They voted to let more illnesses go untreated and to force more families to have to choose between paying medical bills and putting food on the table. And because they knew how dangerous this vote would be, they even initially tried to exempt themselves from the consequences. Trumpcare for us, Obamacare for themselves.

**[It's time to make Republicans pay for this act of cruelty, and the only way we do that is by kicking them out of Congress. Help us raise $100,000 to beat them and fight for our values -- chip in now, and a group of generous donors from Physician Women for Democratic Principles will match your contribution dollar-for-dollar.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf5d/4067b0a/2fec3dce2/7e74bf11/127909159/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Health-Care-Vote-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+CUSTOMDATASETslugwhitelistcommaletterkey&utm_campaign=em_20170504_tp_nd1&source=em_20170504_tp_nd1&refcode=em_20170504_tp_nd1")**

Your donation will help us do things like win two seats in Congress right away in Montana and Georgia, take on every single Republican who just voted for this, and stand with Senate Democrats who are our last line of defense against this despicable bill becoming law.

You've already done so much to make your voice heard on this all-important issue. But the GOP needs to understand that we won't stop at calling their offices or raising hell at town halls.

If Republicans won't listen to their constituents, then we'll throw them out of office. It's that simple.

Help us send that message today. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can towards our $100,000 goal and get your donation matched.

name: Action Alert (vanhollen.org)
subject: save the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
**ACTION ALERT:** **The U.S. House will hold a vote soon to try again to repeal the Affordable Care Act and undermine people with pre-existing conditions.** [**We need your help if we want to stop them.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bee/70cdc2ba/475396c9/397f35d/631060107/VEsH/ "https://makecalls.democrats.org/aca/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+need+your+help+if+we+want+to+stop+the&utm_campaign=em050417&source=em050417")

Team -

Time is running out. We need to flood the phone lines to get our message out. Here's what you can do to help.

* **Tweet your support to tell everyone to call Congress. Use the hashtag #SaveACA
**

* **[Post this link](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bee/70cdc2ba/475396c9/397f35a/631060107/VEsE/ "https://makecalls.democrats.org/aca/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Post+this+link&utm_campaign=em050417&source=em050417") on _Facebook_ to get the word out.**

This latest version of TrumpCare is another true disaster. It gives states the option to eliminate coverage of essential health benefits, including coverage for maternity care, substance abuse, and mental health.

And even worse, while TrumpCare raises costs for people with pre-existing conditions, Republicans wrote in language to protect themselves from this provision. At the end of the day, Americans will be left with less care, higher costs, and fewer protections.

This is unconscionable. President Trump and Republicans are playing an outrageous con game--promising people health care on the campaign trail and then working tirelessly to pass legislation to take it away.

[**Time is running out: We must do everything we can to stop this bill from coming to the Senate. Call now!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bee/70cdc2ba/475396c9/397f35b/631060107/VEsF/ "https://makecalls.democrats.org/aca/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Time+is+running+out+We+must+do+everythin&utm_campaign=em050417&source=em050417")

subject: Update re. healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello --
Earlier today, House Republicans put partisanship over people and passed Donald Trump's latest healthcare proposal.
I won't mince words: Trumpcare would be devastating for hard-working families.
It would penalize those of us with pre-existing conditions, raise premiums, and impose an age tax for people between 50 and 65.
Washington Republicans just took a dangerous step toward repealing the Affordable Care Act, but we still have a chance to stop them, everyone.
[**I need you to please add your name now to join me in urging my colleagues in the Senate to build on and improve the Affordable Care Act, not repeal it.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd47/2a380d31/155f9e7f/fef4c0/125728505/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170504_HouseHealth_all&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for speaking out.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: ❗ House Republicans just passed Trumpcare
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f84/24c69fd9/ec4279be/18e5e969/2517067723/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE505N_digital_email_20170504_KickerTrumpcarePasses_inact&source=WQEFE505N_digital_email_20170504_KickerTrumpcarePasses_inact")
---

Peter,

In a move that would take away health care from tens of millions of Americans, House Republicans just passed Trumpcare.

Desperate to give himself a victory he can brag about, President Trump's plan throws women under the bus: It rolls back key elements of Obamacare, like coverage for pregnancy and birth control.

And a last-minute amendment would allow insurance companies to deny coverage for a horrific list of issues that would now qualify as pre-existing conditions, including surviving sexual assault, surviving domestic violence, having postpartum depression, or having a C-section.

Calling this bill an assault on women isn't hyperbole: It's reality.

The bill now moves to the Senate, where Democrats -- including our 15 women -- are the last line of defense before it lands on Trump's desk. They'll be fighting tooth and nail to stop it.

**Are you with them? Donate $3 right now to stop Trumpcare and protect our women fighting against it:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-Trumpcare](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f84/24c69fd9/ec4279be/18e5e96a/2517067723/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170501_email_Trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopTrumpcare&utm_campaign=WQEFE505N_digital_email_20170504_KickerTrumpcarePasses_inact&source=WQEFE505N_digital_email_20170504_KickerTrumpcarePasses_inact")**

Kate Black

name: Jeff Weaver, OurRevolution.com
subject: GOP: Do as we say, not as we do
body:
The House of Representatives just voted to pass the GOP's disastrous bill to gut the Affordable Care Act and strip millions of their health coverage.
#
Friends,
The House of Representatives just voted to pass the GOP's disastrous bill to gut the Affordable Care Act and strip millions of their health coverage. Republicans have been pushing their so-called American Health Care Act through Congress without a score from the Congressional Budget Office because they know the numbers won't add up.
The GOP would have you believe that they are the party of fiscal conservatism, but passing a bill of this magnitude without a full assessment of the cost is anything but.
**Our Revolution will always give the American people the facts on health care, and the truth now is that more people will die if the health care repeal bill is signed into law.[Chip in $5 to help us fight back against the GOP attack on our health care so that we can win Medicare for All.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d1a/43f17890/dba5d60f/6203a57b/3805038900/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-healthcare?refcode=em170504-subc")**
We may not have a score from the CBO, but it's not hard to tell how Republicans expect us to pay for this: by burdening the middle class and working Americans with even higher costs than they incur under the Affordable Care Act today. The CBO study of the last Trumpcare bill found that 24 million people would lose their health insurance entirely, with millions more forced to pay more to receive less coverage. It's no wonder the GOP forced through a vote before the CBO could do its job.
Some Republicans thought the last bill didn't go far enough, and it appears that they got their wish. But the truth is that even rank and file Republicans don't want their health insurance taken away and large percentages support Medicare for All.
**Health care is the one topic on which we should all agree. Nobody should be at a greater risk of disease, disability, or death because of how much money they make.[Donate $5 to Our Revolution and help us fight to win Medicare for All.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d1a/43f17890/dba5d60f/6203a57b/3805038900/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-healthcare?refcode=em170504-subc")**
We will fix this. With the health care of so many at greater risk today than it was yesterday, your contribution towards Medicare for All is more important now than ever before.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
President
Our Revolution

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: Our government may have no legitimacy
body:
Without the right to vote, a democracy has no legitimacy and cannot exist. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c7/1c469400/2ce4b21/3549e9a/3565830654/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170504_r4w_VRA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170504_r4w_VRA") Friend, Without the right to vote, a democracy has no legitimacy and cannot exist. Across the United States right now, this vital right is under attack. And it's undermining our government's legitimacy as we speak. When millions of people are denied the right to vote, it means elections don't reflect the true will of the people. And that means the candidates that win don't have legitimate authority to govern. That's a big problem for all of us. To combat this legitimacy crisis, **today we 're standing up to demand a new _Voting Rights Act_ for the 21st century.** Will you lend your name? [_**Sign on today. Demand a new _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ to combat the legitimacy crisis in our government.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c7/1c469400/2ce4b21/3549e9b/3565830654/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170504_r4w_VRA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Sign+on+today+Demand+a+new+21st+Century+&utm_campaign=20170504_r4w_VRA") It's crucially important that we fight for the rights of those who are being denied the ability to vote. It is unfair and unjust. But we aren't just fighting for their sake. This is a matter of preserving and restoring the legitimacy of our entire government. Just as the landmark _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ addressed many of the worst voter suppression tactics of its day, like poll taxes and literacy tests, so must the new _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ address modern abuses like gerrymandering and racially motivated voter ID laws and felon disenfranchisement. [_**Show your support for a new _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ today. Add your name. **_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c7/1c469400/2ce4b21/3549e98/3565830654/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170504_r4w_VRA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Show+your+support+for+a+new+21st+Century&utm_campaign=20170504_r4w_VRA") Legitimate democracy comes from the people. For every citizen prevented from casting a ballot, our democracy takes a hit. But just as with all good things in a democracy, this one won't change unless the people demand it. Thank you for showing your support today, Russ Feingold | [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c7/1c469400/2ce4b21/3549e99/3565830654/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170504_r4w_VRA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170504_r4w_VRA")

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Help us save Obamacare
body:
Here's what you can do
#
Team --
For years now, Members of the House of Representatives have relentlessly attacked the Affordable Care Act. Today, they voted to repeal it.
I am sickened, not only by those who voted to repeal it today, but by any and every Member of Congress who has aided and abetted Republican efforts to undercut Obamacare, despite the millions who rely on it just to stay alive.
[**If you or a family member rely on the Affordable Care Act, please share your story with our campaign here >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3378/9e00690/480e5a09/2403484f/719187241/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/acastory")
This fight isn't even close to being over. If you haven't already, please reach out to your Senator -- Floridians can contact Marco Rubio's office at (202) 224-3041 -- and tell them to vote against repealing the Affordable Care Act. If enough of us are willing to work together, we may be able to block this heartless repeal in the Senate.
Access to affordable, quality healthcare should not be a luxury reserved for the wealthy. It should be a right guaranteed to all. Help us send this powerful message to Washington **[by sharing your Obamacare story](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3378/9e00690/480e5a09/2403484f/719187241/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/acastory")** , and by calling your Senator now.
Together, we're going to defeat those who chose political expediency over Floridian lives.
Bring it home,
Andrew

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Appalling [health care]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2670/7377f838/36074ff7/51fb520a/2768236910/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

Just hours ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a bill that would **repeal key provisions of the Affordable Care Act and endanger health care for millions of Americans.**

It would kick millions of Americans off of their health insurance and slash protections for people with pre-existing conditions -- including conditions that are extremely common, such as giving birth by C-section. On top of that, we have no idea how much the bill would cost, because Republicans pushed it through before the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office could do a full analysis.

**Peter, I 'm appalled. Hoosiers deserve so much better than this heartless bill. [Will you add your name to stand with me as I fight to stop the Republican health care bill in the Senate?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2670/7377f838/36074ff7/51fb5205/2768236910/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-joe-to-save-health-care-")**

Now the action turns to the Senate, where **I can assure you that I will fight tooth and nail to protect Hoosiers ' health care.**

I will fight against any bill that takes away the guarantee and cost protections on health coverage for Hoosiers who suffer from conditions like diabetes, cancer, and asthma. You have my word that I'll stand strong against any bill that kicks hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers off of Medicare, Medicaid, and HIP 2.0, and I will never stick our seniors and families with skyrocketing premiums.

But I'm going to need your help, Peter. This fight will take all of us. Can I count on you? **[Add your name to let me know you're with me in the fight to save health care for Hoosiers.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2670/7377f838/36074ff7/51fb5205/2768236910/VEsF/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-joe-to-save-health-care-")**

Thank you,

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: today is a dark day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
The House of Representatives just voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act and threaten the access of tens of millions of Americans to health insurance.

The future of health care in this country will now be decided by the United States Senate.

[**Together, my Senate Democratic colleagues and I will fight tooth and nail for what 's right and best for the American people and to prevent this reckless TrumpCare bill from becoming law. Stand with us now. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bed/70cdc2ba/47523967/397f3c7/3310102594/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-join-the-fight-to-save-the-aca-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Together+my+Senate+Democratic+colleagues&utm_campaign=em050417&source=em050417")

Under this bill, Americans will get less care, higher costs, and fewer protections. Tens of millions stand to lose coverage for essential health benefits, including maternity care, substance abuse, and mental health. Americans with pre-existing conditions will be left with few options and many will simply be unable to get the care they need.

With your help, we will beat this back and go on to elect a Democratic Congress in 2018 that will prioritize the interests of the American people over special interests. This is a fight we need to win.

[**Today is a dark day, but with your help we will work to ensure that in the end the United States Senate will side with everyday people in this fight which touches so many individuals and families across our country.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bed/70cdc2ba/47523967/397f3c4/3310102594/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-join-the-fight-to-save-the-aca-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Today+is+a+dark+day+but+with+your+help+w&utm_campaign=em050417&source=em050417")

Thank you for standing for what's right,

Chris
